brief: Welcome post for VOIDBORN dark fantasy online TCG. Hook headline: "Conquer the Null Zones". Realm atmosphere: The Weeping Grove (kronos). Introduce four elemental realms, deck building, tactical battles, ranked play. Free to start at https://voidborn.fun. Instagram punchy + hashtags; Facebook longer story; Discord markdown feature list + play link.

image.prompt: Cinematic square shot of a dark fantasy volcanic forge, glowing lava rivers running through cracked obsidian ground, embers floating in the air, demonic stone statues looming in the background, sharp focus, hyper-realistic, dark atmospheric lighting, high contrast, obsidian and crimson color palette.
